title: Dreams
content:
I gave my life to another lover,
I gave my love, and all, and all
But over a dream the past will hover,
Out of a dream the past will call.

I tear myself from sleep with a shiver
But on my breast a kiss is hot,
And by my bed the ghostly giver
Is waiting tho' I see him not.
meaning:
Sara Teasdale's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Dreams"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
